next_action: Require local artifact evidence or an explicit blocked provider/runtime state before claiming preview readiness.
rationale: The failure family is a proof-boundary issue. Local eval fixtures can block unsafe claims, but cannot prove live provider, runtime, hosted-session, or launch readiness.
internal_summary: AutoResearch fixture for human_gate_or_reply_durability_blocker; blocked claims: human-gated branch is done; reply durability is configured; first-send or approval path can resume automatically; live Paperclip readiness; Hermes/provider recovery; production promotion.
